titleStmt.title: SII 16.46: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 46. (A.R. No. 165 of 1913.) PĀṆEM, NANDYAL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the courtyard of the Pāṇikēśvarasvāmin temple.
This inscription is dated Śaka 1431, Pramōdūta, Chaitra śu. 15 corresponding to 1510 A.D., March 25, (Monday). The Śaka year quoted is wrong for 1432.

Registers a gift of the village of Būḍidepāḍu in Pāṇem-sīma by Honnapa-nāyaka, son of Bokkasam Dēvapa-nāyaka to the tammaḷas (i.e. priests) Rāmajiyya, Vīrajiyya and others of the temple of Pāṇikēśvara of Pāṇem for the amṛitapaḍi service of the god. Pāṇem-sīma is said to have been obtained by the donor as nāyaṅkara from the king. The record is couched in Telugu interspersed with Kannaḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśrīśrī pāṇikēsvaraliṁgāya namaḥ . svasti śrījayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1431 Agunaṭṭi pramō
dota saṁvatsara cayitra śu 15 lu śrīmatu bokkasaṁ dēvapanāyani
komāruṁḍu hoṁnapanāyakaru pāneyada pāṇikēśvaradēvarastānaṁ
rāmajiyya virajiya lakumajiyya nāgajiyya liṁgajiyya bayirāni pe
ddi mōdalayina tammaḍige koṭṭa grāmada dha¨rmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrī
ma(ṁn®)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrakruṣṇarāyama(ṁ)hārā
yalarū nammage nāyaṁkatanānaku pāliṁcina pāneṁ sīmalōnu kaḍivō
laṁ hōragaṇa kaḍivōlaṁ būḍidepāḍa grāmavanu pāṇikēśvaradēvara Amṛtapaḍi
ge dāravōśi yi stimi yiccina vivaraṁ Ā grānūnaku celle polaṁ vivaraṁ tamma
ḍirājupalle polamēra mōvanu rāceruvu nīrumunugupolaṁ veligānu migilina polaṁ
vorakanuma mēragānu yī naḍumaṁgala regaḍu yeranēla maḍi mōnabu sahi
tamugānu polamu dēvaraku sahiraṁṇyōdakadānadhārāpū¨rvakamu
gānu mātṛpitṛvaṁśālaku Akṣayapuṇyalōkāvāpti Ayyeḍi ko
raku yi stimi Ā grāmānaṁgala catuśīmaṁgala vāpikūpataṭākanidhini
kṣēpaĀgāmisiddhasādyalaneṭi [Ā]ṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyaṁgānu dēvaraku
trikāla nayivēdyānaku trivācā yi stimi Ā grāmānaṁgala rokhadhā
nyālu rūpusēsukoni nayivēdyaṁ mōdalayina Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālu sē
yucunu sukhānanu vuṁḍēdi yī dha¨rmāsaku yevvaru tappinaḍicinā
nu tama mātāpitāḷlanuṁnu gōbrāṁhmalānu guruvulānu vāra
ṇāśilōnu svahastavadhacēśina dōṣānaṁ bōvuvāru . śrī
pālanā [.] dānātsva¨rgamavā The rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 16.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
